atomic-chat.name: Atomic Chat
atomic-chat.description: A tool to run local AI chats and workflows offline.
atomic-chat.long_description: Atomic Chat is a free, open-source local AI chat app that runs large language models entirely on your device (1,000+ models like Llama, Qwen, Gemma, Mistral via GGUF/ONNX) with TurboQuant for faster, memory‑efficient inference and built‑in agent capabilities that let the AI act, automate workflows, and keep persistent local memory; because it runs offline with no cloud, no accounts, and auditable code, it’s ideal for privacy‑focused users, developers, and power users who want a fast, uncapped, customizable ChatGPT alternative without subscriptions.
atomic-chat.short_description: Atomic Chat is a free, open-source local AI chat app that runs large language models entirely on your device (1,000+ models like Llama, Qwen, Gemma, Mistral via...

atomic-chat.long_description_ar: Atomic Chat هو تطبيق دردشة مجاني ومفتوح المصدر يعمل بتقنية الذكاء الاصطناعي على جهازك، ويشغل نماذج لغوية ضخمة بالكامل (أكثر من 1000 نموذج مثل Llama وQwen وGemma وMistral عبر GGUF/ONNX) باستخدام TurboQuant لاستنتاج أسرع وأكثر كفاءة في استخدام الذاكرة، بالإضافة إلى إمكانيات وكيل مدمجة تسمح للذكاء الاصطناعي بالتصرف وأتمتة سير العمل والاحتفاظ بذاكرة محلية دائمة. ولأنه يعمل دون اتصال بالإنترنت، بدون سحابة أو حسابات، وبشفرة قابلة للتدقيق، فهو مثالي للمستخدمين والمطورين والمستخدمين المتقدمين الذين يهتمون بالخصوصية ويرغبون في تجربة سريعة وغير محدودة.…

autocalls.long_description: MovableType.ai is an AI-powered writing platform that transforms simple ideas into complete book manuscripts in minutes. The tool leverages artificial intelligence to generate up to 35,000 words of high-quality, personalized content that matches your unique writing style and voice. Beyond manuscript creation, MovableType.ai offers a comprehensive suite of AI-driven features including book proposal generation, marketing plans, SEO optimization, and direct publishing integration. Authors, subject matter experts, and entrepreneurs use this tool to overcome writer's block, dramatically reduce content creation time, and maintain a consistent voice across all their work. The AI analyzes your writing patterns and audience preferences to ensure the final product resonates with your target readers while maintaining your authentic perspective.
